description: Create a content slide on JPMorgan Private Markets Fund investment strategies with a center donut chart and supporting bullet lists on the left and right in a three-column layout.

header.headline: JPMorgan Private Markets Fund investment strategies
header.sub: Bottom-up, opportunistic investment approach seeking the highest conviction ideas

items.text: Purchase positions in existing private equity funds or assets
Leverage PEG platform to gain information and assignment advantage

right.body:
Co-investments
• Targeted investments alongside high-quality GPs
• Diversified sector exposure (consumer staples, healthcare, business services, and technology)
• Attractive economics
• Shorter duration

Primary Investments
• Investments in newly formed private equity funds
• Identify and partner with “top-tier” private equity firms
• Potential for stapled co-investment or secondary opportunities

footer.source: Note: The above reflects view of PEG. Opinions and statements of financial market trends that are based on current market conditions constitute our judgment and are subject to change without notice. We believe the information provided here is reliable but should not be assumed to be accurate or complete. The views and strategies described may not be appropriate for all investors. This is not a complete list of reasons to invest in the respective investment types. There is no guarantee a PEG investment will provide any of the above factors.
